intro.subtitle: Mobile Engineer - Android, Flutter & React Native
intro.bio: Developer with solid experience building cross-platform and native mobile applications. Passionate about what happens behind the screen: APIs, IoT integrations, and real-world systems. I take a hands-on approach with a strong focus on quality and continuous growth.

12.description: Home Assistant integration that monitors the uptime and health of major AI/LLM provider APIs in real time

details: Specialized consultancy for large clients, designing and building custom mobile solutions.
- Cross-platform apps with Flutter/Dart, React Native/Expo/TypeScript.
- Native Android with Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose.
- AWS (S3, Amplify, AppSync, Cognito), Firebase, Datadog integrations.
- RESTful API and web interface development with PHP, Symfony and Twig.
- Management and maintenance of PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases.
Design, development and maintenance of hybrid mobile apps and microservices.
- Cross-platform apps with Flutter and Dart, UI/UX design included.
- RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, MongoDB management.
- Enterprise networking: static/dynamic routing, IPv4/IPv6, subnetting, switching.
- IP services, QoS, redundancy, access security, automation, virtualization, wireless LANs.
- Languages: C, C++, Java, JavaScript, PHP, SQL. Web: HTML, CSS, RESTful APIs.
- Databases: MySQL, MariaDB. Methodologies: Agile, SCRUM.
- Tools: Git, GitHub, Docker, AWS EC2.
